assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and internet access.
No platform account, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create an IBM Cloud account and deploy the Code Engine Hello World application from the console.

first_success.outcome: Code Engine builds and deploys the sample application and serves its public endpoint.
first_success.observable_signal: Opening the application URL returns the Hello World response.

route_selection.surface: Code Engine Hello World in the IBM Cloud console
route_selection.rule: Prefer a hosted or direct API route over local installation, and prefer documented cURL when it reaches the same first success.
route_selection.selected: Code Engine Hello World in the IBM Cloud console

candidates.name: Code Engine Hello World in the IBM Cloud console
candidates.reason: The console path deploys a hosted application from sample source without requiring local containers or CLI installation.

candidates.name: Code Engine CLI path
candidates.reason: It adds IBM Cloud CLI and plugin installation that the console route avoids.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to IBM Cloud and open Code Engine.
required_path.observable_result: The Code Engine console is available.

required_path.action: Create a Code Engine project in a supported region and resource group.
Create an application from the documented Hello World sample source.
Wait for the application revision to become ready.
required_path.observable_result: Code Engine exposes an application URL.
The Hello World response is displayed.

prerequisites.description: Permission to create a Code Engine project and application.
A supported IBM Cloud region and resource group.

external_gates.description: IBM Cloud IAM must allow project and application creation.

unavoidable_waits.description: Code Engine must build and deploy the sample before the URL is ready.

platform_outcomes.description: Code Engine builds and deploys the sample application and serves its public endpoint.

excluded.reason: These occur after the first observable end-to-end result.

uncertainties.question: New-account identity verification and regional resource availability can add undocumented screens.
uncertainties.impact: The required path may differ for some fresh accounts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough through the authenticated first-success state.
